title: Tamil Nadu plans to set up six shelters for abandoned and injured animals
description: The shelters will function under the Department of Animal Husbandry Medical care and emergency treatment will be overseen by veterinarians deputed by the Regional Joint Director of the department; each shelter will have four animal handlers and one cook

description: Many experience a 4 pm slump, but it's not laziness. Experts explain that this dip in alertness stems from our body's natural 24 - hour clock, influenced by lunch choices, stress, and sleep debt.  Understanding these biological cues can help manage energy levels effectively, rather than just reaching for caffeine.

title: Told to pay, BJP MLA Chaudhary Babulal’s son slaps Agra toll plaza employee
description: Son of Fatehpur Sikri MLA Chaudhary Babulal allegedly slapped a toll employee at Raybha toll plaza after being asked to pay the toll fee due to a missing FASTag. The incident, captured on CCTV, was reportedly resolved amicably with the toll worker declining to file a complaint. The MLA, however, alleged abusive behavior from the toll staff.

title: Quote of the day by Keanu Reeves: ‘If you're a lover, you've gotta be a fighter’
description: "If you're a lover, you've gotta be a fighter"... Keanu Reeves said this famous quote on 'The Drew Barrymore Show' in 2021. In Keanu’s philosophy, "fighting" isn't about physical aggression, but rather the effort, commitment, and resilience required to maintain and protect a deep bond.

title: Candace Owens sparks backlash with “Bride of Charlie” series on Erika Kirk
description: Candace Owens has stirred major controversy after releasing the trailer for her YouTube investigative series The Bride of Charlie, centered on Erika Kirk. The preview quickly went viral, prompting backlash, intense online debate, and questions directed at Charlie Kirk’s allies. While supporters call it accountability journalism, critics warn it risks harassment and speculation, as silence from prominent conservative voices fuels growing tension.
